steps.title: Match the claim
steps.content: Moreno and colleagues challenge the idea that people universally make temporal distinctions along imagined linear axes like left and right. Supporting evidence should show Yupno speakers using a different spatial organization for time.

steps.title: Reject irrelevant findings
steps.content: A concerns where gestures occur, not which axis represents time. C concerns hand preference, not temporal organization. D concerns grammar shared with Spanish, not spatial gestures for past or future. The answer is B.
